title: Dictionary for Interpreting Behavior Control and Modification

nodes.description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions ([Actions]) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails.

nodes.description: Execute a series of child nodes in order, from left to right, remembering which ones have already succeeded.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions ([Actions]) in sequence. If any action succeeds, remember it and move to the next. If any action fails, start the sequence again from the beginning.

nodes.description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right and advance on running or success.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions ([Actions]) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails. While an action is running or has succeeded, go to the next action.

nodes.description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right and re-check a condition for each node.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions ([Actions]) in order while checking a condition for each action. If [Condition] move to the next action. Else if [!Condition], end the sequence.

nodes.description: Execute child node based on blackboard value.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Read blackboard value and compare it against a set of cases. If a case matches the blackboard value, execute corresponding [Action]. Else if no case matches, execute default [Action].

nodes.description: Execute a node while a condition is true else execute and alternative node if that same condition fails.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: While [Condition], do [Action]. If [!Condition], execute alternative [Action].

nodes.description: Repeatedly execute a child node for a specified number of iterations, until a specific status is returned or forever.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute [Action] continuously until it fails or succeeds. Else keep executing [Action] forever.

nodes.description: Execute multiple child nodes simultaneously, ensuring all are completed successfully.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions [Actions] simultaneously. If either a success threshold is reached or all actions succeed, the execution was successful. Else if any action fails, the execution fails.

nodes.description: Execute child nodes sequentially from left to right, until one succeeds or all fail.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions ([Actions]) consecutively. If any action ([Action]) fails, move to the next action until an action succeeds. If no action succeeds, the execution fails.

nodes.description: Execute child nodes sequentially from left to right, until one succeeds. If all fail retry again from the beginning.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions ([Actions]) consecutively. If any action ([Action]) fails, move to the next action until an action succeeds. If no action succeeds, start all over again until an action succeeds.

nodes.description: Force child node to succeed regardless of the conditions.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute [Action] and make sure it always succeeds.

nodes.description: Force child node to fail regardless of the conditions.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute [Action] and make sure it always fails.

nodes.description: Repeatedly execute child node until its successful.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Continuously execute [Action] until it succeeds.

nodes.description: Re-execute a child node for either a fixed number of times or until its successful.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute [Action]. If it fails, re-execute it either for a specified number of times or until it succeeds.

nodes.description: Execute a series of child nodes in sequence. While a node is running, re-evaluate previous child nodes.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions [Actions] in sequence. If [Action] fails, stop execution. While [Action] is still running, re-evaluate previous actions.

nodes.description: Execute a series of child nodes in order from left to right. While a later node is running, restart evaluation from node 0.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute the following actions [Actions] in order. If [Action] succeeds, stop execution. Else keep executing and re-evaluating previous actions whenever an action is running.

nodes.description: Execute a set of child nodes multiple times.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute [Action] for a set number of times or infinitely.

nodes.description: Check if a value in memory can be either true or false matches the expected value.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Find a value on the blackboard and check if it matches a given rule.

nodes.description: Wait for a given duration before running or returning a result from the associated child node.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute delayed [Action]. If execution succeeds, start delay timer. After delay period is exhausted, resume execution.

nodes.description: Negate a the execution outcome of a child node.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute inverted [Action]. If [Action] succeeds, reverse it to fail. Else if [Action] fails, reverse it to succeed.

nodes.description: Keep executing child node as long as it does not fail.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute [Action]. If [Action] succeeds, restart it. Else if [Action] fails, stop looping and continue execution.

nodes.naturalLanguageDescription: Continuously try to re-execute a child node until it succeeds.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Keep trying to execute [Action] until it succeeds. If try succeeds, stop retrying and continue. If try fails, keep retrying until it succeeds.

nodes.description: Try to run the primary child node. If it fails, run the next child node to recover and try to execute the primary child node again until retries are exhausted.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: Execute main [Action]. If it fails, execute recovery action ([Action]). After recovery, retry main action ([Action]). If recovery action ([Action]) fails and retries are exhausted, stop execution.

nodes.description: Execute child node, but only for a maximum duration.
nodes.behaviorTemplate: If [Action] fails to execute within specified time limit, interrupt the execution and stop it.

nodes.description: A child node name
nodes.behaviorTemplate: If action name is a standard ROS action, controller or decorator, refer to it as: the ROS action [insert action name]. Else refer to it as: the custom action [insert action name]

nodes.description: A series of child node names
nodes.behaviorTemplate: List action names

nodes.description: A check that returns success
nodes.behaviorTemplate: [condition ID] is true

nodes.description: A check that returns failure
nodes.behaviorTemplate: [condition ID] is false
